name: renovation
description: The dining room is under renovation for two weeks. Half your tables are unavailable, but the payoff is a satisfaction bonus afterward.

name: supply_crisis
description: A major supplier goes into extended outage mid-game. Tests supply chain diversification and contingency planning.

name: tourist_season
description: Massive demand swings as a festival brings tourists, then leaves the neighborhood quiet. Tests dynamic staffing and inventory scaling.
